title: Help & Advice - Taiwo Owatemi MP
meta_description: WHAT MPS CAN DO How I can help you What I can Do In Westminster I can raise matters which impact the constituency on your behalf in Westminster, by writing to relevant departments or officials on your behalf In Coventry I can contact both Coventry City Council as well as local organisations and private companies
headings: h2: the independent office for police conduct
h2: Book one of my surgery appointments
text_excerpt: Help & Advice - Taiwo Owatemi MP Maybe Not Static File --> Maybe Not Static File --> Invalid Path --> Maybe Not Static File --> Maybe Not Static File --> Maybe Not Static File --> External URL: https://maxcdn.bootstrapcdn.com/font-awesome/4.7.0/css/font-awesome.min.css --> Maybe Not Static File --> Maybe Not Static File --> Maybe Not Static File --> Excluded option --> Skip to content Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Search Search WHAT MPS CAN DO How I can help you What I can Do In Westminster I can raise matters which impact the constituency on your behalf in Westminster, by writing to relevant departments or officials on your behalf In Coventry I can contact both Coventry City Council as well as local organisations and private companies to try and help you resolve your issues What I can't Do In Westminster As a Whip, I can’t make speeches in the House of Commons, table questions to Ministers, or sign Early Day Motions In Coventry I can’t help settle disputes between family members, neighbours, or between you and an employer I can’t provide financial or business advice I can’t give legal advice or interfere in court cases or any decisions previously made in a court of law Facing an issue? help & advice MENTAL HEALTH HOUSING HEALTHCARE DOMESTIC ABUSE BENEFITS IMMIGRATION FOOD INSECURITY OLDER PEOPLE YOUNG PEOPLE LEGAL ADVICE UTILITIES TRANSPORT EDUCATION NEURODIVERSITY CRIME Coventry City Council If the issue you are raising relates to housing or council tax I would recommend contacting one of your ward councillors at Coventry City Council. Citizen's Advice Bureau A national organisation that offer confidential advice and support on a range of issues – online, over the phone, and in person, for free. the independent office for police conduct IOPC oversee the police complaints system in England and Wales. West Midlands Police Here you can find your local officer, get the latest crime statistics and advice, and help the police with appeals for information. more support As your MP, I want to ensure I represent you in any way I can. If the issue you are dealing with doesn’t relate to any of the topics above, these organisations may be able to help. Help in coventry Coventry Councillors Radford mal mutton mal.mutton@coventry.gov.uk maya ali maya.ali@coventry.gov.uk Patricia hetherton patricia.hetherton@coventry.gov.uk Bablake Bea Christopher beatrice.christopher@coventry.gov.uk Holbrooks Rachel lancaster rachel.lancaster@coventry.gov.uk Sherbourne Gavin lloyd gavin.lloyd@coventry.gov.uk dave toulson dave.toulson@coventry.gov.uk whoberley Bally singh bally.singh@coventry.gov.uk jayne innes jayne.innes@coventry.gov.uk pervex akhtar pervez.akhtar@coventry.gov.uk let’s talk Book one of my surgery appointments If you want to book an appointment to discuss any issues that matter to you that I can help with, please complete the form below. Contact us This is the official website of Taiwo Owatemi, MP for Coventry North West. Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To find out if I am your MP click here. quick links Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Contact Info Constituency Office: 02477 672089 taiwo.owatemi.mp@parliament.uk join My Newsletter Sign up for my newsletter to enjoy updates on Labour policy, my campaigns, and the recent work I’ve been doing in Westminster and Coventry.
